calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Oct-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Elder Abuse TRO & OSC Hearing
Dept. 514, Judge Paul Alvarado, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Plaintiff Teresita Williams present in Pro Per.
Defendant Lucy Moya present in Pro Per with Tagalog interpreter Jonas Sangalang.
Parties were sworn and direct examined.
Proof of Service is in the file.
The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, Plaintiff's request for issuance of a restraining order is GRANTED as follows: Defendant shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected person(s) Teresita Williams, The Residence, Workplace and vehicle.
Defendant shall not Harass, Attack, Strike, Threaten, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail, Take Any Action, Directly or Through Others, to Obtain the Addresses or Locations of the Protected Person(s).
Firearm restriction applies.
Expires Oct 10, 2015.
Order was submitted and signed in open court.

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Sep-26-2012 Continued To Oct-10-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Teresita Williams (Petitioner). Lucy Moya (Respondent). Jonas Sangalang (Friend/Interpreter for the Respondent).

The Court stated that Ms. Moya (Respondent) filed a Restraining Order against Ms. Williams (Petitioner) and that these matters all involved the same issues. In its discretion, the Court continued the hearing to October 10, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 514 so related cases can be heard together. Notice of New Hearing Date and Order on Reissuance signed in open court. TRO is reissued to October 10, 2012. The Clerk will provide copy of the Order on Reissuance to each party and no further service is required. Ms. Williams shall give a copy of the Order to the Police Dept.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
